catalogDescription: Get everything: the Advanced Financial Model, the Pitch Deck Storyboarder, and the Cap Table Builder at the best price.
title: The Strategic Fundraising Readiness Suite
subtitle: Everything You Need to Scale, Model, and Pitch Your Startup.
descriptionBody:
Raising venture capital is not about 'luck.' It's about preparedness. Investors can smell a founder who doesn't understand their numbers from across the room. 

We've bundled the 'Big Three' systems of the Founder Systems toolkit into one high-stakes suite. If you are preparing for a Seed or Series A round, this is your operating system. Model your growth, storyboard your deck, and plan your dilution in one weekend.
section1Body: Get the Advanced Financial Model (MRR, Cohorts, DCF), the Pitch Deck Storyboarder, and the Cap Table Planning tool for 30% less than buying them individually.

features.name: Advanced SaaS Financial Model
features.desc: Heavy-duty 3-year engine with MRR waterfalls and investor-grade unit economics.

features.name: The High-Stakes Storyboard
features.desc: Narrative-first framework used by million-dollar founders to build decks that convert.

features.name: Cap Table Planning Master
features.desc: Excel-based dilution simulation and scenario modeling for Seed/Series A.

whyPoints.title: Pass Every Due Diligence
whyPoints.desc: Model, Deck, and Cap Table. When a VC asks for 'more detail', you won't scramble. You'll already have the answer.

whyPoints.title: Save Significant Cash
whyPoints.desc: Get the entire toolkit for less than the price of a single hour with a part-time CFO.

whyPoints.title: One Source of Truth
whyPoints.desc: Ensure your deck's numbers match your model's projections exactly.

footerResultDetails: Total command over your fundraising process.
whoThisIsFor: Founders preparing for Seed or Series A institutional rounds.
Teams who need to professionalize their financial and strategic reporting.
Founders raising for the first time who want a structured blueprint.

faq.q: What exactly is in this bundle?
faq.a: You get the full Advanced SaaS Financial Model, the Pitch Deck Storyboarder, and the bonus Cap Table Planning Excel in one download.

faq.q: Can I upgrade if I already bought the Model?
faq.a: Yes! Just reach out to support and we'll apply your previous purchase as credit.
